description: Reserved schema code for the G6 Territorial Hierarchy editor. Per-locale display label + abbreviation overrides for boundary nodes managed by the DIGIT egov-location / boundary-service. The 4-level tree itself (Region/District/Sub-district/Locality) lives in the boundary service; this overlay is the CRS-side editor surface for translated labels. THIS IS A DESIGN-ONLY STUB — properties block intentionally minimal; full schema lands when phase G6 is implemented. See docs/g-phases/g6-territorial-hierarchy.md.

boundaryCode.description: Foreign key into egov-location boundary tree. Schema for the rest of the row is reserved by the G6 design doc.
